title: Delivery Rider
description:
Position Summary:
The Delivery Rider will play a key role in supporting the sales team by managing, coordinating, and delivering sales collateral and sample items to local customers. The role requires close collaboration with the Supervisor and individual salespersons to ensure timely and accurate handling of all sample requests, while maintaining a professional representation of the company during deliveries.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Collect, organize, and manage a variety of sales collateral and sample items.
  • Coordinate with the Supervisor and sales team to fulfill daily sample requests efficiently.
  • Deliver samples and collateral items to local customers in a timely and professional manner.
  • Maintain accurate records of items delivered, received, or returned.
  • Assist in stock checking, inventory management, and replenishment of sample items.
  • Ensure that all deliveries comply with company standards for safety, quality, and customer service.
  • Report any delivery issues, delays, or customer feedback to the Supervisor promptly.
  • Perform basic maintenance and care for the delivery vehicle or transport equipment

Requirements:

  • Valid motorbike driver’s license with a clean driving record.
  • Prior experience in delivery, logistics, or sales support is preferred.
  • Basic organizational and time-management skills.
  • Good communication skills and professional demeanor.
  • Ability to work independently and follow instructions from the Supervisor.
  • Physically fit to handle lifting and carrying of sample items and collateral materials.
  • Good knowledge of Singapore roads and navigation skills required.

Additional Information:

  • 5.5-day work week.
  • Work Hours - Monday to Friday (8.30am to 5.30pm), Saturday (8.30am to 1pm).
  • This is a one-year contract position, with the possibility of becoming permanent based on business needs and performance.

By submitting your application for this role, you consent to the collection, use, and disclosure of your personal data by TAK Products & Services Pte. Ltd. for the purposes of processing your job application. We will retain your personal data for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected or as required by law. We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the confidentiality of your personal data. For more information on how we handle your personal data, please refer to our Privacy Policy (https://tak.com.sg/about-tak/privacy-notice/). If you wish to withdraw your consent or have any concerns about the use of your personal data, please feel free to reach out to us by writing to hr.admin@tak.com.sg.

postedCompany.description:
TAK PRODUCTS & SERVICES PTE. LTD.

TAK, headquartered in Singapore, is an established company supplying its own proprietary brands of decorative surfaces to the furniture industry.  Our strong regional presence spans Asia.


Always pushing the limits in design through constant product development, we work with leaders in the interior design and furniture industry to create beautiful interiors.

At TAK, we believe in job excellence.  With a strong and dedicated team, we are a professional and creative organisation that believes in our people.
